## Scenario

What does this template generate? Who is the target user?

## Why this scenario

- Is there volume demand? (cite TikTok / Reels / YouTube examples)
- Is it under-served by existing templates?

## Draft prompt

```
(paste your engineered prompt here)
```

## Verification

- [ ] Ran on at least one Seedance client
- [ ] Client: (jimeng / capcut / byteplus / volcengine / piapi / other)
- [ ] Model variant: (seedance2.0fast / seedance2.0 / ...)
- [ ] Date: YYYY-MM-DD
- [ ] Success rate (out of 5 runs):
- [ ] Demo video link (optional but helpful):

## Risks / known badcases

What does this template fail at?
